parameters.subject: =Candidate Review Required - {{ $json.name }} - {{ $json.role }} | Trilles AI
parameters.message:
=

Trilles AI — Candidate Requires Review

Hi Hiring Manager,

A candidate has been screened for the {{ $json.role }} position and requires your manual review.

Name{{ $json.name }}
Email{{ $json.email }}
Role{{ $json.role }}
Score{{ $json.score }}
Summary{{ $json.summary }}
Strengths{{ $json.strengths }}
Concerns{{ $json.concerns }}

Please review and take appropriate action.

Hiring Team
Trilles AI

parameters.subject: =Your Application at Trilles AI - {{ $json.role }}
parameters.message:
=

Trilles AI — Application Update

Dear {{ $json.name }},

Thank you for taking the time to apply for the {{ $json.role }} position at Trilles AI. We truly appreciate your interest in joining our team.

After carefully reviewing your application, we regret to inform you that we will not be moving forward with your candidacy at this time. This was a difficult decision as we received many strong applications.

We encourage you to keep an eye on our future openings as we are a growing team and new opportunities may arise that better match your profile.

We wish you all the best in your job search and future endeavors.


Kind regards,

Hiring Team
Trilles AI

parameters.subject: =Interview Invitation - {{ $json.name }} - {{ $json.role }} | Trilles AI
parameters.message:
=

Trilles AI — Interview Invitation

Dear {{ $json.name }},

We are pleased to inform you that after reviewing your application for the {{ $json.role }} position at Trilles AI, you have been selected for an interview.

Our team was impressed by your profile. Here's a brief summary of what stood out:

{{ $json.summary }}

We will follow up shortly with the interview schedule and further details.

Please feel free to reach out if you have any questions in the meantime.


Best regards,

Hiring Team
Trilles AI
